summary: Email Notifications (Resend) integration testing complete. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - Email notifications toggle, Test Email button, and header badge working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Resend integration uses asyncio.to_thread() correctly for blocking SDK calls
Email status endpoint correctly returns configured, has_api_key, alert_email, email_notifications_enabled
Test email endpoint returns email_id from Resend API confirming real email delivery
Frontend Email Notifications section has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Email ON badge in header updates reactively when email_notifications is toggled
seed_data_creation: None required - uses existing monitor config
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email notifications via Resend fully functional. Test email sends real emails via Resend API (not mocked). Backend .env has RESEND_API_KEY and CVE_ALERT_EMAIL configured. Frontend has Email Notifications section in Monitoring tab with toggle, email input, and Test Email button. All features verified working.

mocked_apis.note: Resend emails are sent via real Resend API - not mocked

backend_tests.PUT /api/security/monitor/config (both f: PASS - Updated both email_notifications and alert_email
backend_tests.Email status reflects config changes: PASS - Status endpoint correctly reflects config changes

frontend_tests.Email ON badge visible in header: PASS - Shows 'Email ON' when email_notifications enabled
frontend_tests.Email Notifications section visible: PASS - Shows toggle, email input, Test Email button
frontend_tests.Test Email button click: PASS - Shows alert 'Test email sent successfully! Check your inbox.'
frontend_tests.Toggle email notifications OFF: PASS - Email badge disappears from header, email input hidden
frontend_tests.Toggle email notifications ON: PASS - Email badge reappears, email input shows
